title: OpenAI brings its updated voice mode to the ChatGPT desktop app.
summary: Powered by GPT-Live , the new voice mode allows users to ask ChatGPT to check their calendar, draft an email, prepare for a meeting, and perform other tasks on their computer by talking out loud.
